name: Cheese and Wine Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, cream of tartar, salt, and baking soda.
2. Add dry milk to the sifted ingredients.
3. Cut in vegetable shortening until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
4. Stir in sugar, minced onion, beaten egg, milk, white wine, and dried oregano.
5. Mix thoroughly.
6. Spread the batter into a greased 8 or 9-inch round pan.
7. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 425°F for 15-20 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
